original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper document with two hole-punch marks at the top. The page features multiple blue "RECEIVED" date stamps, some oriented horizontally and others vertically, indicating different points of receipt within government agencies in July and October 1947. Faint, reversed text is visible through the paper from the opposite side.

elements.description: Multiple faded blue ink stamps on aged paper, including two 'RECEIVED' stamps with legible dates such as 'JUL 8 4 36 PM '47' and 'JUL 8 9 17 AM '47', and partial legible words including 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F.B.I.', 'LIAISON SECTION', and 'TECHNICAL LABORATORY'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and nature of blue ink stamps on aged paper, with both noting multiple RECEIVED stamps and specific dates, and no contradiction exists in the quoted text.
